creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Aug 15, 2009 at 09:50:05AM +0000, Jesco Freund wrote:
>  the committed changes break Dovecot's managesieve support since
>  mail/dovecot-managesieve has not been adapted to fit with
>  Dovecot-1.2.x. As the dovecot Makefile itself refers to
>  mail/dovecot-managesieve, Dovecot can currently not be installed with
>  managesieve support; so I'd suggest to either fix
>  mail/dovecot-managesieve to a 1.2 compatibel version (e. g. 0.11.8) or
>  to disable the WITH_MANAGESIEVE option for the mail/dovecot port.

I've marked that option as BROKEN. I would suggest contacting the
maintainer of mail/dovecot-managesieve to see if the port can be
updated.

-- WXS
